metadata.description: The Dataverse Instance to connect to within a Flow when using Web API Calls

select.Message: @coalesce(item()?['outputs']?['body']?['error']?['message'], item()?['outputs']?['body']?['message'], item()?['error']?['message'], 'No Message found. Please check Flow-Run.')
@coalesce(item()?['outputs']?['body']?['error']?['message'], item()?['outputs']?['body']?['message'], item()?['error']?['message'], 'No Message found. Please check Flow-Run.')

Route_Operations_set.description: Check whether a Route Operation Version is assigned to the Reference Item

parameters.$filter: _mserp_dataareaid_id_value eq @{items('Apply_to_each_Route_Operation_(Virtual_Entity)')?['_mserp_dataareaid_id_value']} and mserp_routeid eq '@{items('Apply_to_each_Route_Operation_(Virtual_Entity)')?['mserp_routeid']}' and mserp_operationid eq '@{items('Apply_to_each_Route_Operation_(Virtual_Entity)')?['mserp_operationid']}'

inputs.name: varErrorMessage
inputs.value: [ERROR] - No Primary Production Hour set for Operation '@{items('Apply_to_each_Route_Operation_(Virtual_Entity)')?['mserp_operationid']}'

CREATE_Template_Positions.description: Create Template Positions for both BOM Positions (= "Artikelstamm") and Route Operations (= "Produktionsstunde")

inputs.name: varErrorMessage
inputs.value: [ERROR] - Action '@{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Action']}' failed with error message: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Message']} (Status: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Status']} / Status Code: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['StatusCode']})
